MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on WED-FEB-06-2013:
Plaintiff MCALPIN APARTMENTS, LLC is represented by Richard Rhel with Attorney Denise Mingrone
Defendant EMILY GRONENDYKE is present with Attorney Denise Mingrone representing the defendant though limited scope.

Judge Pro Tem David Yang, litigants, and counsel confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is NOT filed. The trial date of FEB-11-2013 is vacated.
